name: Mermaid Flowchart with Subgraphs — Multi-Phase Experiment
input: Create a flowchart with subgraphs showing a multi-phase experiment: Phase 1 subgraph (Sample Collection → DNA Extraction → Quality Check), Phase 2 subgraph (Library Prep → Sequencing → Raw Data), Phase 3 subgraph (Alignment → Variant Calling → Annotation), with connections between phases.
qualityCriteria: No placeholder or lorem ipsum content
napkinBenchmark: Flowchart with grouped subgraph containers showing phase separation.

data.syntax:
flowchart TD
    subgraph Phase1[Phase 1: Sample Prep]
        A[Sample Collection] --> B[DNA Extraction]
        B --> C[Quality Check]
    end
    subgraph Phase2[Phase 2: Sequencing]
        D[Library Prep] --> E[Sequencing]
        E --> F[Raw Data]
    end
    subgraph Phase3[Phase 3: Analysis]
        G[Alignment] --> H[Variant Calling]
        H --> I[Annotation]
    end
    C --> D
    F --> G
data.caption: Multi-phase genomics experiment workflow with subgraph containers
